intake.user_request: Fix false staleness positives at orchestrator.ts lines 473-480. The @exports tag written by --source-headers uses element.exports from buildSemanticElementsFromState (semantic/header-generator.ts:118); the staleness check at orchestrator.ts:473-480 compares against rawExports from extractRawExports (a different tree-sitter traversal). These two paths can produce different symbol sets, causing valid headers to be flagged stale.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Category=fix on core pipeline path; touches orchestrator.ts (high-blast-radius), requires test verification before merge.

in_scope: Fix the staleness comparison at orchestrator.ts:473-480 to normalize rawExports against the same symbol set that header-generator uses
Add/extend test covering the false-stale case
Verify --source-headers + re-scan produces headerStatus=current for previously-stale files
out_of_scope: Changing the header format or @exports grammar
Refactoring header-generator.ts beyond the normalization fix

constraints: Must not break existing stale detection for genuinely stale files
Fix must survive npm test (1495+ tests passing)
Build must compile clean (npm run build)
